name: San Antonio Chicken with Picante Black Bean Sauce
recipeIngredient: 6 Chicken breast halves, boned and skinned
1 cup Black beans, canned, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle both sides of chicken with 1 teaspoon of the cumin and garlic salt.
2. Heat oil in a 12-inch skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Add chicken; cook for 3 minutes.
4. In a medium bowl, combine beans, corn, Pace Picante Sauce, red pepper, and remaining 1 teaspoon cumin.
5. Turn chicken; spoon the bean mixture evenly over chicken.
6. Reduce heat to medium; cook uncovered for 6-7 minutes or until chicken is cooked through.
7. Push the bean mixture off chicken into the skillet.
8. Transfer chicken to a serving platter using a slotted spoon; keep warm.
9. Cook the bean mixture over high heat for 2-3 minutes, stirring frequently.
10. Spoon over chicken and sprinkle with cilantro. Serve with additional Pace Picante Sauce.
